title: crispr-screen
author: Magnuson, Brian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Processing of DNA sequencing data for CRISPR screens.  Includes tools for QC and for reorienting paired-end reads where forward and reverse ends of PCR amplicon are randomly mate 1 (R1) or mate 2 (R2).  
 This publication is for Git commit 5be34a91bf4bb145e54319f2448137b29fb0cb42 of repository hosted at https://github.com/mctp/crispr-screen
steps_raw:
Processing of DNA sequencing data for CRISPR screens.  Includes tools for QC and for reorienting paired-end reads where forward and reverse ends of PCR amplicon are randomly mate 1 (R1) or mate 2 (R2).  
 This publication is for Git commit 5be34a91bf4bb145e54319f2448137b29fb0cb42 of repository hosted at https://github.com/mctp/crispr-screen
